g.title: Dependency: aws_instance.public_web -> aws_subnet.public

aws_internet_gateway.igw Zone: INTERNET | Category: network
2 threats: HIGH - Trust boundary crossing: internet -> private (Tampering) HIGH - Trust boundary crossing: internet -> private (Tampering)

aws_instance.public_web Zone: DMZ | Category: compute
3 threats: HIGH - EC2 instance with public IP address (Info Disclosure) MEDIUM - EC2 instance with unencrypted root volume (Info Disclosure) LOW - EC2 instance without detailed monitoring (Repudiation)

aws_instance.unmonitored Zone: DMZ | Category: compute
3 threats: HIGH - EC2 instance with public IP address (Info Disclosure) MEDIUM - EC2 instance with unencrypted root volume (Info Disclosure) LOW - EC2 instance without detailed monitoring (Repudiation)

aws_db_instance.public_db Zone: DMZ | Category: database
4 threats: CRITICAL - RDS instance is publicly accessible (Info Disclosure) HIGH - RDS instance without encryption at rest (Info Disclosure) MEDIUM - RDS instance without automated backups (Tampering) MEDIUM - Trust boundary crossing: dmz -> private (Tampering)

aws_subnet.public Zone: DMZ | Category: network
2 threats: MEDIUM - Trust boundary crossing: dmz -> private (Tampering) MEDIUM - Trust boundary crossing: dmz -> private (Tampering)

aws_instance.unencrypted_ebs Zone: PRIVATE | Category: compute
2 threats: MEDIUM - EC2 instance with unencrypted root volume (Info Disclosure) LOW - EC2 instance without detailed monitoring (Repudiation)

aws_vpc.main Zone: PRIVATE | Category: network
1 threats: MEDIUM - VPC without flow logs enabled (Repudiation)

aws_vpc.secondary Zone: PRIVATE | Category: network
1 threats: MEDIUM - VPC without flow logs enabled (Repudiation)

aws_default_security_group.default_open Zone: PRIVATE | Category: unknown
1 threats: MEDIUM - Default security group allows traffic (Elevation of Privilege)

aws_security_group.wide_open Zone: PRIVATE | Category: network
1 threats: HIGH - Security group allows unrestricted ingress (Spoofing)

aws_security_group.ipv6_open Zone: PRIVATE | Category: network
1 threats: HIGH - Security group allows unrestricted ingress (Spoofing)

aws_db_instance.no_backup_db Zone: PRIVATE | Category: database
2 threats: HIGH - RDS instance without encryption at rest (Info Disclosure) MEDIUM - RDS instance without automated backups (Tampering)

aws_lambda_function.no_vpc_lambda Zone: PRIVATE | Category: serverless
3 threats: HIGH - Lambda function with broad execution role (Elevation of Privilege) MEDIUM - Lambda function not attached to VPC (Elevation of Privilege) LOW - Lambda function without dead letter queue (Denial of Service)

aws_lambda_function.admin_lambda Zone: PRIVATE | Category: serverless
3 threats: HIGH - Lambda function with broad execution role (Elevation of Privilege) MEDIUM - Lambda function not attached to VPC (Elevation of Privilege) LOW - Lambda function without dead letter queue (Denial of Service)

aws_lambda_function.no_dlq_lambda Zone: PRIVATE | Category: serverless
1 threats: LOW - Lambda function without dead letter queue (Denial of Service)
aws_route_table.public_rt Zone: PRIVATE | Category: network

aws_s3_bucket.unencrypted Zone: DATA | Category: storage
3 threats: HIGH - S3 bucket without server-side encryption (Info Disclosure) MEDIUM - S3 bucket without versioning (Tampering) MEDIUM - S3 bucket without access logging (Repudiation)

aws_s3_bucket.public_bucket Zone: DATA | Category: storage
4 threats: CRITICAL - S3 bucket allows public access (Info Disclosure) HIGH - S3 bucket without server-side encryption (Info Disclosure) MEDIUM - S3 bucket without versioning (Tampering) MEDIUM - S3 bucket without access logging (Repudiation)

aws_s3_bucket.no_versioning Zone: DATA | Category: storage
2 threats: MEDIUM - S3 bucket without versioning (Tampering) MEDIUM - S3 bucket without access logging (Repudiation)

aws_iam_policy.wildcard_policy Zone: MANAGEMENT | Category: iam
1 threats: CRITICAL - IAM policy with wildcard actions (Elevation of Privilege)

aws_iam_user.no_mfa_user Zone: MANAGEMENT | Category: iam
1 threats: HIGH - IAM user without MFA requirement (Spoofing)

aws_iam_role.overpermissive_role Zone: MANAGEMENT | Category: iam
1 threats: HIGH - IAM role with overly broad assume role policy (Elevation of Privilege)
S3 bucket allows public access: The S3 bucket ACL or policy allows public read or write access. This can lead to data exposure or unauthorized data modification.

IAM policy with wildcard actions: The IAM policy grants wildcard (*) actions, providing unrestricted access to AWS services. This violates least privilege and could allow an attacker to escalate privileges across the account.

RDS instance is publicly accessible: The RDS database instance has publicly_accessible set to true, allowing direct connections from the internet. Database endpoints should never be exposed to the public internet.
S3 bucket without server-side encryption: The S3 bucket does not have server-side encryption configured. Data at rest may be accessible if storage media is compromised.
S3 bucket without server-side encryption: The S3 bucket does not have server-side encryption configured. Data at rest may be accessible if storage media is compromised.
IAM user without MFA requirement: The IAM user or login profile does not enforce multi-factor authentication. Without MFA, compromised credentials alone grant full access.

g.text: IAM role with overly broad assume role policy
g.title: IAM role with overly broad assume role policy: The IAM role's trust policy allows assumption by overly broad principals (e.g., all accounts, all services). This could allow unintended entities to assume the role.

g.text: EC2 instance with public IP address
g.title: EC2 instance with public IP address: The EC2 instance is configured with a public IP address, directly exposing it to internet traffic. This increases the attack surface significantly.

g.text: EC2 instance with public IP address
g.title: EC2 instance with public IP address: The EC2 instance is configured with a public IP address, directly exposing it to internet traffic. This increases the attack surface significantly.
Security group allows unrestricted ingress: The security group allows inbound traffic from 0.0.0.0/0 or ::/0, potentially exposing services to the entire internet.
Security group allows unrestricted ingress: The security group allows inbound traffic from 0.0.0.0/0 or ::/0, potentially exposing services to the entire internet.

g.text: RDS instance without encryption at rest
g.title: RDS instance without encryption at rest: The RDS instance does not have storage encryption enabled. Data stored in the database can be read if the underlying storage is compromised.

g.text: RDS instance without encryption at rest
g.title: RDS instance without encryption at rest: The RDS instance does not have storage encryption enabled. Data stored in the database can be read if the underlying storage is compromised.

g.text: Lambda function with broad execution role
g.title: Lambda function with broad execution role: The Lambda function's execution role may have overly broad permissions, allowing it to access resources beyond its intended scope.

g.text: Lambda function with broad execution role
g.title: Lambda function with broad execution role: The Lambda function's execution role may have overly broad permissions, allowing it to access resources beyond its intended scope.

Trust boundary crossing: internet -> private: Data flows from aws_internet_gateway.igw (internet zone) to aws_vpc.main (private zone), crossing a trust boundary. This flow should be authenticated, encrypted, and validated.

Trust boundary crossing: internet -> private: Data flows from aws_internet_gateway.igw (internet zone) to aws_vpc.main (private zone), crossing a trust boundary. This flow should be authenticated, encrypted, and validated.
S3 bucket without versioning: The S3 bucket does not have versioning enabled. Without versioning, deleted or overwritten objects cannot be recovered, and tampering is harder to detect.

S3 bucket without access logging: The S3 bucket does not have access logging configured. Without logging, unauthorized access attempts cannot be detected and actions cannot be attributed to specific actors.
S3 bucket without versioning: The S3 bucket does not have versioning enabled. Without versioning, deleted or overwritten objects cannot be recovered, and tampering is harder to detect.

S3 bucket without access logging: The S3 bucket does not have access logging configured. Without logging, unauthorized access attempts cannot be detected and actions cannot be attributed to specific actors.
S3 bucket without versioning: The S3 bucket does not have versioning enabled. Without versioning, deleted or overwritten objects cannot be recovered, and tampering is harder to detect.

S3 bucket without access logging: The S3 bucket does not have access logging configured. Without logging, unauthorized access attempts cannot be detected and actions cannot be attributed to specific actors.

g.text: EC2 instance with unencrypted root volume
g.title: EC2 instance with unencrypted root volume: The EC2 instance root block device is not encrypted. Data on the volume can be accessed if the underlying storage media is compromised.

g.text: EC2 instance with unencrypted root volume
g.title: EC2 instance with unencrypted root volume: The EC2 instance root block device is not encrypted. Data on the volume can be accessed if the underlying storage media is compromised.

g.text: EC2 instance with unencrypted root volume
g.title: EC2 instance with unencrypted root volume: The EC2 instance root block device is not encrypted. Data on the volume can be accessed if the underlying storage media is compromised.
VPC without flow logs enabled: The VPC does not have flow logs configured. Without flow logs, network traffic patterns cannot be analyzed for security incidents or anomalies.
VPC without flow logs enabled: The VPC does not have flow logs configured. Without flow logs, network traffic patterns cannot be analyzed for security incidents or anomalies.
Default security group allows traffic: The default security group has not been locked down. Any resource inadvertently placed in the default SG may have unintended network access.
RDS instance without automated backups: The RDS instance has backup retention set to 0 or not configured. Without backups, data loss from deletion or corruption cannot be recovered.
RDS instance without automated backups: The RDS instance has backup retention set to 0 or not configured. Without backups, data loss from deletion or corruption cannot be recovered.

g.text: Lambda function not attached to VPC
g.title: Lambda function not attached to VPC: The Lambda function runs outside a VPC, meaning it has direct internet access and cannot leverage VPC security controls like security groups and NACLs.

g.text: Lambda function not attached to VPC
g.title: Lambda function not attached to VPC: The Lambda function runs outside a VPC, meaning it has direct internet access and cannot leverage VPC security controls like security groups and NACLs.

Trust boundary crossing: dmz -> private: Data flows from aws_db_instance.public_db (dmz zone) to aws_vpc.main (private zone), crossing a trust boundary. This flow should be authenticated, encrypted, and validated.

Trust boundary crossing: dmz -> private: Data flows from aws_subnet.public (dmz zone) to aws_vpc.main (private zone), crossing a trust boundary. This flow should be authenticated, encrypted, and validated.

Trust boundary crossing: dmz -> private: Data flows from aws_subnet.public (dmz zone) to aws_vpc.main (private zone), crossing a trust boundary. This flow should be authenticated, encrypted, and validated.

EC2 instance without detailed monitoring: The EC2 instance does not have detailed monitoring enabled. Without monitoring, unauthorized access or resource abuse may go undetected and actions cannot be attributed.

EC2 instance without detailed monitoring: The EC2 instance does not have detailed monitoring enabled. Without monitoring, unauthorized access or resource abuse may go undetected and actions cannot be attributed.

EC2 instance without detailed monitoring: The EC2 instance does not have detailed monitoring enabled. Without monitoring, unauthorized access or resource abuse may go undetected and actions cannot be attributed.

g.text: Lambda function without dead letter queue
g.title: Lambda function without dead letter queue: The Lambda function does not have a dead letter queue configured. Failed invocations may be silently lost, affecting reliability and making it difficult to diagnose processing failures.

g.text: Lambda function without dead letter queue
g.title: Lambda function without dead letter queue: The Lambda function does not have a dead letter queue configured. Failed invocations may be silently lost, affecting reliability and making it difficult to diagnose processing failures.

g.text: Lambda function without dead letter queue
g.title: Lambda function without dead letter queue: The Lambda function does not have a dead letter queue configured. Failed invocations may be silently lost, affecting reliability and making it difficult to diagnose processing failures.

g.text: Badge number = threat count on resource
